jiuwen.core.runner#

Runner#

class jiuwen.core.runner.Runner#

Global execution entry point.

resource_mgr: ResourceManager

Process-global resource registry.

async run_agent(agent, inputs: dict) -> dict

Execute an agent with given inputs.

ResourceManager#

class jiuwen.core.runner.ResourceManager#
add_workflow(key: str, factory: Callable) → None#
get_workflow(key: str) → Workflow | None#
add_tool(key: str, tool) → None#
